title: Kalmec
content:

}}
{{Quote|She and her friends—they call themselves the Kalmec—shave their shoulders to remind people that underneath their fur, Wookiees are just like everyone else.|Vareesa Enan, on Furellas and the Kalmec|<ref name="ATJ 2" />}}
The '''Kalmec''' was a criminal organization formed by members of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By posing as a group of social activists, the Kalmec infiltrated various influential positions and established an intelligence network that gathered information from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Following the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict fought between the Republic and the separatist [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the criminal organization aided the CIS by sowing seeds of discontent among the populations of various Republic-held worlds.

==Organization==
{{Quote|She has a bunch of friends who have their shoulders shaved, too. I asked her why they did that, and she gave me a long explanation that basically said, because if we don't, people treat us like animals.|Vareesa Enan, on Furellas and the Kalmec|<ref name="ATJ 2" />}}
The Kalmec was a criminal organization based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] that was made up entirely of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], a [[Hair/Legends|furry]], [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="ATJ 2" /> from the planet of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="TAUT">{{LivingForce|Looking In: The Air Up Thaere}}</ref> Operating under the guise of being a group of social activists, the Kalmec quietly infiltrated a number influential positions.<ref name="ATJ 5" /> They provided an information gathering system for powerful organizations and they employed Wookiees all over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to gather intelligence.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|196|Kalmec, the}}</ref> The Kalmec engaged in various illegal operations<ref name="ATJ 5" /> and they also delivered [[Spice/Legends|spice]] and other pleasantries to wealthy individuals.<ref name="AMA">{{LivingForce|A Mon Alone}}</ref> Members of the organization shaved the hair from their shoulders<ref name="ATJ 5" /> to reveal their [[Color/Legends|pink]]-colored skin beneath,<ref name="TAUT" /> which they claimed was intended to demonstrate that underneath their fur, Wookiees were just like all other sentient beings and did not deserve to be treated like animals.<ref name="ATJ 5" /> Some among the Kalmec enjoyed fighting and [[Death/Legends|killing]], and would on occasion participate in [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiatorial]] matches. The term "Kalmec" was not a word from [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]], the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the Wookiee species.<ref name="TAUT" />

==History==
{{Quote|The Wookiees. They call themselves "Kalmec," but I don't know what it means. They are here for the sport. They love to fight. They live to kill.|[[Xirossk]], on the Kalmec pit-fighters that traveled to Burnout|<ref name="TAUT" />}}
The Kalmec operated during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] following the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> and became one of the most accomplished criminal organizations on Ralltiir.<ref name="CSWE" /> Inspired by the Wookiees' success, the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Chef/Legends|cook]] [[Kikow]] established a small Ithorian-operated [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring on Ralltiir, known as the [[Herd]], which he modeled on the larger Kalmec.<ref name="ATJ 2" /> At some point, the Ithorian tourist [[Vareesa Enan]] acquired a [[Little Kikow|pet]] [[Ralltiir tiger]] while on vacation on Ralltiir, and the Kalmec [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] [[Furellas]] arranged to have the Wookiees smuggle the creature off-world for the tourist.<ref name="ATJ 5" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Kalmec gathered information for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a separatist regime that opposed the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TCWCG">''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''</ref> The Wookiees also aided the Confederacy by sowing seeds of discontent among the populations of a number of worlds loyal to the Republic, committing vicious crimes in an attempt to undermine confidence in the galactic government.<ref name="ATJ 5" /> In about [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="21 BBY">The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' states that the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|''Living Force'']] campaign is set one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], an event that is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. As the ''Living Force'' adventure ''[[Below the Belt: Philology|Philology]]'' [[Cularin's disappearance|moved]] the campaign forward ten years to the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], ''[[Looking In: The Air Up Thaere|The Air Up Thaere]]'' is therefore dated to circa [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> a band of Kalmec pit-fighters traveled to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Burnout (space station)|Burnout]] in the [[Thaereian system]] and were scheduled to appear in the station's [[Burnout arena|gladiatorial arena]]. Shortly before they were due to fight in the combat ring, the Wookiees encountered a group of [[Heroes of Cularin|freelance agents]] on the lower levels of the station and attacked them, as a warmup for their upcoming bout. However, the agents defeated the Wookiees.<ref name="TAUT" />

==Notable members==
===Furellas===
{{Quote|Her name was Furellas, and she had pretty, light-brown fur. I told her so, and she smiled, and I guess all Wookiee smiles are kind of scary. Hers was, at least. But at least she had pretty fur.|Vareesa Enan, on Furellas|<ref name="ATJ 2" />}}
{{Main|Furellas}}
Furellas was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]<ref name="ATJ 5" /> female Wookiee with light-brown fur<ref name="ATJ 3">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030116ralltiir3|series=A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir|text=Part 3: Exhibition}}</ref> who became a lieutenant within the Kalmec, and she shaved her shoulders as a sign of her membership.<ref name="ATJ 5" /> She was an acquaintance of the Ithorian Kikow and during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of Vareesa Enan's visit to Ralltiir, Furellas met with Kikow in the [[Cambriele Exploration Auditorium]], a [[Museum/Legends|museum]] located in [[Cambriele|Ralltiir's capital city]] that was a popular neutral ground for underworld business meetings.<ref name="ATJ 3" /> Kikow introduced Enan to the Wookiee and Furellas subsequently purchased a Ralltiir tiger kitten for the tourist from a market stall, which she suggested Enan name "Little Kikow."<ref name="ATJ 4">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030123ralltiir4|series=A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir|text=Part 4: The Ithorian and the Tiger}}</ref> However, she warned the tourist to be careful whom he told about the tiger,<ref name="ATJ 5" /> because it was illegal to sell or transport the creatures,<ref name="ATJ 4" /> so she introduced the Ithorian to some of her Kalmec colleagues and arranged for them to transport the kitten off-world, on Enan's behalf.<ref name="ATJ 5" />

===Kaarror===
{{Main|Kaarror}}
Kaarror was a male Wookiee who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Kashyyyk and early in his life, he was captured and sold into a life of [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. Shortly after he came of age, he was won by the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] slaver [[Phylus Mon]], who saw something in the Wookiee and decided to free him. Kaarror later joined the Kalmec and supervised some of their shipments of spice. He was promoted through the ranks of the organization and eventually shaved his shoulders, and during his time among the Kalmec, he was a party to [[Death/Legends|murder]], extortion and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]]. However, Kaarror's new life ended when he came into contact again with Phylus Mon, who forced the Wookiee to work for him once more.<ref name="AMA" /> Circa [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="20 BBY">The ''Living Force Campaign Guide'' states that the ''Living Force'' campaign is set one year after the Invasion of Naboo, an event that is dated to 32 BBY by ''The New Essential Chronology''. As the ''Living Force'' adventure ''Philology'' moved the campaign forward ten years to the time of the Clone Wars, and the adventure ''[[Night Eyes: Night's Homecoming|Night's Homecoming]]'' established that by Year 4 of the campaign over a year had elapsed since the events of ''Philology'', ''[[A Mon Alone]]'' can therefore be dated to circa [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].</ref> Kaarror accompanied Mon to the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] and was among a party of Mon's minions that [[Raid on the Almas Sith fortress|journeyed]] into the depths of a [[Almas Sith fortress|Sith fortress]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Almas]]. There, they sought to discover the secrets of the creation of [[Sith battlelord]]s—warrior-leaders that were [[Force-bond/Legends|bonded]] to their subordinates via [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—and after finding a [[Book/Legends|tome]] that detailed the rituals needed to create [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] battlelords, Mon performed the ceremony in hope that it would bond him to Kaarror and several other of his minions and captives. However, due to the presence of the [[Darkstaff]], an ancient [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifact]] of which Mon had gained custody, the ritual failed. Instead of bonding them to Mon, the staff ripped the [[Force essence]]s from the bodies of Kaarror and the other individuals on whom the ceremony was performed, and transferred them into a [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] pyramid.<ref name="AMA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Kalmec were created by [[Morrie Mullins (real person)|Morrie Mullins]] and first featured in ''[[A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir]]'', a series of articles that were published on the website [[Wizards.com]] in [[January]] [[2003]] as part of the site's ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' feature.<ref name="ATJ 2" />
